name: /standards-audit: gap analyzer identifies sources with zero citing rules and lists them as gaps
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit.md" --include-gaps && grep "Gaps" audit.md 1>&2 && grep "uncovered-source" audit.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '- id: uncovered-source
  name: U
  url: https://u.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
